name: Slavic Square Dancers
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg until foamy.
2. Add brown sugar and vanilla extract to the beaten egg and mix well.
3. Gradually add dry ingredients (flour, salt, baking soda) to the wet mixture, stirring continuously.
4. Stir in the chopped walnuts.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 8-inch square pan.
6. Bake at 325°F for 30 minutes.
7. Cut into squares and serve warm.
